sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32145" key="e)kkentri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκεντρίζω</orth>, prob. written for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐγκ</foreign>-, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.185</biblScope> </bibl> ; <sense id="n32145.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκκεντέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
